overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban downtown area. The player character crosses a street and walks along a sidewalk beneath elevated structures, passing pedestrians and vehicles in a futuristic cyberpunk setting with heavy neon signage and wet reflective streets.

events.description: ego crosses the yellow striped crosswalk while vehicles pass by
turns right onto the sidewalk leaving the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and turning onto the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing covering the street
tall buildings with glowing neon advertisements and signage
tall black street lamp illuminating the intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a wide urban intersection at night, with the ego crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk. Neon billboards glow on the surrounding buildings while a white sedan passes through the intersection. The camera turns right onto the sidewalk, transitioning from the open crosswalk to the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk next to the street, passing under the elevated structure

entered.detail: orange metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street
elevated concrete highway or monorail track structure overhead
string of red spherical paper lanterns hanging overhead along the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure, with orange guard rails separating the walkway from the street. Red lanterns hang overhead in a line, and the neon billboards shift to the left side as the camera progresses down the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk with parked vehicles and street furniture

events.description: pedestrian walking ahead stumbles and falls to the ground near a street lamp

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing a parked vintage car and approaching a pedestrian who then stumbles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead who suddenly stumbles and falls to the ground

entered.detail: vintage cream-colored sedan parked on the right side of the sidewalk
red glowing vending machine or terminal with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk narrows as the camera passes a parked cream-colored vintage sedan and a red glowing vending terminal. A pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction suddenly stumbles and falls near a street lamp post, creating a notable event in the otherwise quiet street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching major intersection with traffic signals

events.description: white van drives past on the street to the left of the sidewalk
approaching crosswalk and traffic lights at the end of the block

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward the intersection, passing the area where the pedestrian fell

notable_agents.action: white van driving past on the street from behind

entered.detail: traffic signal lights suspended over the upcoming intersection
yellow striped crosswalk marking at the end of the block
tall modern office buildings with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The final stretch approaches a major intersection with visible traffic lights and crosswalk markings ahead. A white van passes by on the street to the left, and tall office buildings rise in the distance. The street opens up from the narrow sidewalk to a wider intersection area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-lit urban intersection into a narrow covered walkway that eventually opens back up into a bustling city center. It begins with the camera crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath glowing billboards as a white sedan passes through the intersection, before turning right onto a sidewalk. As the camera moves beneath an elevated highway structure, the environment shifts to a covered path lined with orange guard rails and a row of hanging red lanterns. The scene then narrows, passing a cream-colored vintage sedan and a glowing red vending terminal just as a pedestrian ahead stumbles and falls near a street lamp. Finally, the walkway expands once more toward a major intersection where a white van passes by and tall office buildings rise against the night sky.
